expectedAppealCitations: Patient was put on Non-Invasive Ventilation (NIV) support (IPAP 14, EPAP 6, FiO2 50%) to combat Type 1 Respiratory Failure.
On 13/10/2023 (Day 2), respiratory distress persisted but was controlled on NIV. Vitals stabilized hemodynamically (BP: 118/76 mmHg, PR: 88 bpm). However, target SpO2 was dependent on continuous NIV.
On 14/10/2023 (Day 3), patient's condition improved. Successfully weaned from NIV to High-Flow Nasal Cannula (HFNC) at 30 L/min, FiO2 40%.
